pageContext.name: Yor Forger Nendoroid
pageContext.description: Sideshow and the Good Smile Company presnt the Yor Forger Nendoroid Collectible Figure.  Yor Forger from the anime Spy x Family joins the Nendoroid series! Also known as Codename: Thorn Princess, the skilled assassin trained in the art of killing from a young age.  The anime figure comes with three face plates including a standard face, a smiling face with closed eyes, and a more soft and gentle smiling face.  Enjoy using the included optional parts like her weapons to create all kinds of poses based on your favorite scenes from the series!  Be sure to add this palm-sized Yor Forger figure to your Spy x Family figure collection!
